title: DNA-extraction of Daphnia and symbionts
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7jsc3","text":"This protocol was designed for DNA extraction of about 50 adult female Daphnia magna, it should also work for 1-150 animals but with adjusted reagent volumes. For achieving HMW DNA or maximizing yield, some modifications are indicated as substeps. Before DNA extraction, animals can be freed from microbes using antibiotics (https://www.evolution.unibas.ch/ebert/lab/daphnia_dna.htm) and should be dehydrated and snap-frozen with liquid nitrogen for archiving HMW DNA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":71,"length":13},{"style":"italic","offset":157,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":325,"length":57}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D066C6D0F81011EEB85F0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.evolution.unibas.ch/ebert/lab/daphnia_dna.htm"}}}}
steps: Add Sample and 200 µL Cell Lysis Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045696 to a 1.5 ml tube. (See abstract for how to prepare the animals.)
Grind animals with a clean, DNA(ase)-free plastic pestle, matching the shape of the 1.5 ml tube to maximize tissue maceration.
Add 300 µL Cell Lysis Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045696 and vortex shortly.
Add 20 µL ProtK 20 mg/mL and carefully invert 25 times.
Incubate at 55 °C while shaking at 400 rpm, °C, overnight ( Overnight incubation increases yield dramatically).
Put sample On ice , add 20 µL RNAse A 20 mg/mL to the cooled sample, and carefully invert 25 times.
Incubate at 37 °C while shaking at 400 rpm, °C, for 01:00:00 .
Put sample on On ice for 00:01:00 .
Add 300 µL Protein Precipitation Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045697 and vortex for 00:00:15 .
Centrifuge for 00:04:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .
Pipette supernatant ( 800 µL – 1.000 µL ) to a 2 ml tube. Discard tissue.
Add the same amount of isopropanol ( 800 µL – 1.000 µL ) to the supernatant and carefully invert 25 times.
Centrifuge for 00:03:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .
Discard supernatant, add 500 µL 70 % ethanol, and carefully invert until the pellet dislodges.
Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at 16000 x g, °C, .
Discard supernatant.
Apply SRE Kit PacBio Catalog #102-208-300 for HMW DNA and repeat step 14.-16. twice for purification.
Put the open tube in the vacuum centrifuge for 00:15:00 .
Add 80 µL DNA Hydration Solution Qiagen Catalog #1045698 and incubate in the dark overnight. If fewer animals are being used or less DNA yield is expected, add less ( 20 µL - 50 µL )
For HMW DNA, use snap-frozen animals and pre-cool lysis solution and tube with ice.
For HMW DNA, use cold a pestle and only move it up and down 10 times (no twisting).
If the pellet is not tight, put tube On ice for 00:05:00 and go to step #10 or pre-cool centrifuge at 4 °C .
For HMW DNA, use a 70 μm mesh. pluriStrainer Mini 70 µm (Cell Strainer, pluriSelect, 43-10070-40)
For HMW DNA, carefully invert 50 times.
For maximum yield (but not HMW), use cold isopropanol and add 2 µL glycogen. Then, put the sample in the freezer for 01:00:00 .
For maximum yield (but not HMW), use cold ethanol.
creator: Pascal Angst
